channel.title: Ghost of Radio: The Shadow
channel.description: "Who knows what evil lurks in the hearts of men? The Shadow knows!" Every episode of The Shadow (1937-1954) from radio's golden age. Lamont Cranston fights crime using his power to cloud men's minds. Perfect for late night listening, sleep, or anyone who loves classic noir and mystery. Subscribe on YouTube at youtube.com/@GhostOfRadio
channel.itunes:author: Ghost of Radio

item.title: Death House Rescue | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: Death House Rescue - Original broadcast from The Shadow radio series. Air date: 1937-09-26. "Who knows what evil lurks in the hearts of men? The Shadow knows!" Listen to this classic noir radio drama from the golden age of radio. More episodes at ghostofradio.com | YouTube: youtube.com/@GhostOfRadio
